title: No README.md shipped
evidence: run_dir has app.py, models.py, test_app.py, pyproject.toml only — no README.md (REQUIREMENTS.json R11 requires setup/run docs)
suggestion: Add a README.md documenting install (pip install -e '.[test]'), run (uvicorn app:app), and test (pytest) instructions

title: Test reset fixture uses back-door DB access, contrary to ATDD prompt
evidence: test_app.py:16-20 _reset_db calls models.delete_db()/models.init_db() directly rather than resetting via the public API; ATDD prompt requires 'no back-door access to internals or the database'
suggestion: Reset state through the API surface, or document the fixture as an accepted setup seam; otherwise ATDD independence is achieved via internals

title: Uses deprecated FastAPI/SQLAlchemy/stdlib APIs
evidence: app.py:19 @app.on_event('startup') (deprecated, use lifespan); app.py:76,89,113 Session.query(...).get() (SQLAlchemy 2.0 legacy, use Session.get); app.py:126 datetime.utcnow() (deprecated in 3.12+)
suggestion: Migrate to lifespan handlers, Session.get(), and datetime.now(timezone.utc)

title: Line coverage 68%, below full
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.68; defect_rate=1.0 so build+all 20 tests pass — uncovered lines are the no-op update branch (app.py:95-96) and __main__ guard (app.py:141-143)
suggestion: Add a PUT-with-empty-body test to cover the early-return branch; the __main__ block is inherently untestable
